entity_types.name: Company
entity_types.description: Commercial organizations producing vehicles, energy, or software.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Named individuals involved in leadership, founding, or engineering roles.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: Vehicles, hardware, or branded offerings sold by companies.

entity_types.name: Technology
entity_types.description: Technical systems, software capabilities, or platforms.

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: Cities, regions, or places where operations or headquarters are located.

entity_types.name: Service
entity_types.description: Services or network-level capabilities offered to customers.

relation_groups.name: Leadership and Corporate Structure
relation_groups.description: Founding, executive leadership, naming, and organization-person links.

relations.name: joined_company
relations.description: A person joined a company in a role.

relations.name: ceo_of
relations.description: A person serves or served as CEO of a company.
relations.detail: Elon Musk became CEO of Tesla in 2008.

relations.name: headquartered_in
relations.description: A company is headquartered in a location.
relations.detail: Tesla is headquartered in Austin, Texas.

relations.name: named_after
relations.description: A company is named after a person.
relations.detail: Tesla is named after Nikola Tesla.

relation_groups.name: Products and Technology
relation_groups.description: How companies build products and technical capabilities.

relations.name: introduced
relations.description: A company introduced or launched a product.

relations.name: developed
relations.description: A company developed a technology capability.

relations.name: uses_technology
relations.description: A product uses or provides a technology.

relations.name: shares_platform
relations.description: A product shares components or platform architecture with another product.
relations.detail: Model Y shares platform components with Model 3.

relations.name: offers_service
relations.description: A company offers a customer-facing service or network.

relations.name: located_in
relations.description: A facility is located in a location.
relations.detail: Gigafactory Texas is located in Texas.
